data.name: Lust Poker Club
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Lust Poker Club!

Your debts have you backed against the wall, and there’s only one way out — an elite tournament in a luxurious mansion where magic intertwines with industrial aesthetics. Against you stand seven devilishly attractive women, each with her own plans for this evening… and for you.

Do you have what it takes to clean them all out and take the pot?

As the tournament progresses, their personal stories unfold in parallel — rivalries, hidden intentions, fragile alliances, and quiet moments between matches. At the table, words can matter just as much as the cards in your hand.

♠ Unique opponents
♠ Realistic poker with dynamic
♠ Parallel character storylines developing throughout the tournament
♠ An industrial-magic atmosphere inspired by 90s anime aesthetics

data.short_description: Story-driven erotic poker set in a world where magic meets industry. Enter a high-stakes tournament in a grand mansion and face seven distinct women, each with her own style and motives. Master psychological bluffing in realistic, unscripted hands as parallel character stories unfold.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8,10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間
